Ntc Of Mtn To Compel Responses To Interrogatories And For Monetary Sanctions And Ntc Of Submission
Off Calendar Aug-07-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Plaintiff Bank of America, N.A. (USA)'s Motion To Compel Responses To Interrogatories is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded against Defendant in the amount of $240, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED

Ntc Of Mtn To Establish Admissions And For Monetary Sanctions And Ntc Of Submission
Off Calendar Aug-07-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Plaintiff Bank of America, N.A. (USA)'s Motion To Establish Admissions is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff's Request For Admissions are deemed admitted. Sanctions are awarded against Defendant in the amount of $240, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED
